title: Indian-Style Mushroom Bake
description: A flavorful and aromatic Indian-inspired mushroom bake, perfect for a weeknight dinner. This dish is a great way to enjoy the earthy flavors of mushrooms in a new and exciting way.
instructions: In a large skillet, heat 2 tablespoons of oil over medium heat. Add the onion and cook until softened, about 5 minutes.
Add the mushrooms, garlic, and ginger to the skillet. Cook, stirring occasionally, until the mushrooms release their liquid and start to brown, about 5 minutes.
Sprinkle the curry powder, salt, and black pepper over the mushroom mixture. Stir to combine.
Transfer the mushroom mixture to a 9x13-inch baking dish.
Top the mushroom mixture with shredded cheese.
Bake for 20-25 minutes, or until the cheese is melted and bubbly.
Serve hot, garnished with fresh cilantro or scallions if desired.
